title: Kassek-Ka
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Kassek-ka.jpg]] |name=Kassek-Ka |homeworld=[[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]][[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Codru-Ji]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] |feathers= |eyes=Hazel |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|And you are prepared to accept our offer?''"
"''Oh yes. As Rikkar-Du himself pointed out, the old ways must sometimes adapt to new realities.''"
"''Serve us well, old man. You see the price paid by those who refuse.|[[Darth Kruhl]] and Kassek-Ka|}} '''Kassek-Ka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Codru-Ji]] clan leader. In [[137 ABY]], another clan head named [[Rikkar-Du]] was contacted by [[Darth Kruhl]] with a proposal of giving him power over the clans of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]] if he submitted to the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]] under [[Darth Krayt]]. At a meeting of the heads of the clans attended by Kassek-Ka, [[Rikkar-Du]] attempted to convince the other leaders that they must unite to oppose Imperial rule. Kassek-Ka protested the idea of an alliance under one leader, saying it was not of their old ways—plotting, kidnapping, and coups. After the meeting broke up, Rikkar-Du visited with his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Tassa]], and told her to go back to their tent with their son, [[Jassar]]. Some time after Rikkar-Du left for the temple and Jassar had run off from his mother, Kassek-Ka [[Death/Legends|killed]] Tassa. Darth Kruhl confronted Rikkar-Du over disclosing his offer. When Jassar tried to defend his father, Khrul killed him before [[Assassination on Munto Codru|assassinating]] Rikkar-Du, an action that Khrul and Kassek-Ka had agreed upon and a message about defying the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. Kassek-Ka then confirmed he would accept Darth Khrul's offer and adapt to the new reality. ==Behind the scenes== Kassek-Ka appeared in [[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]]. Due to the lettering of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] using all capital letters, it is unclear within the issue if the third "k" is capitalized. However, it is written as uppercase in the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', in which the character is mentioned in Tassa's entry.{{CSWECite|III|223|Tassa}} ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|||Tassa}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kassek-ka |es=Kassek-ka }} [[Category:Chiefs]] [[Category:Codru-Ji]] [[Category:Imperial agents]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Personnel of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]]
